package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_map_recreated_for_static_lookup: Layer: Memory allocation. Flag static lookup maps rebuilt inside functions instead of package-level immutable tables.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule567PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario567Positive(records []Rule567PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
